data_sources.description: Live web search via WebSearch tool — news, Wikipedia, ECI official results

term_cache.TVK: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam — political party founded by actor Vijay on 2 Feb 2024
term_cache.Thalapathy: Fan title for actor Vijay (Joseph Vijay), meaning 'commander'
term_cache.SPA: Secular Progressive Alliance — DMK-led coalition in Tamil Nadu
term_cache.VCK: Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi — Dalit rights party led by Thirumavalavan
term_cache.Dravidian duopoly: 59-year alternating power between DMK and AIADMK (1967–2026)
term_cache.Kolathur: Chennai constituency held by MK Stalin since 2011; lost to TVK's VS Babu in 2026

findings.question: How did Thalapathy Vijay become CM of Tamil Nadu?
findings.answer_summary: TVK won 108/234 seats in its debut election (May 2026), breaking 59-year Dravidian duopoly. Vijay formed a 120-MLA coalition (TVK+INC+VCK+Left+IUML) and was sworn in as CM on 10 May 2026.
